tagline: The World Plays. Lady E Luck Pays.

character_arcs.lady_e: Opens the day as the ultimate match day host. Dressed in her referee-inspired black-and-gold dress, she sets the tone — confident, magnetic, welcoming fans. At Golden Hour she closes the day with the mystery drop announcement.
character_arcs.lucky_lou: Arrives in his green-and-gold soccer jersey cheering for his favorite team. He almost misses his bonus window (classic Lou), but redeems himself by pulling in his friends with the referral code and lands the Hat Trick Bonus. He wins at Golden Hour.
character_arcs.the_golden_dealer: Silent presence throughout. Appears during the Golden Boot Jackpot reveal and the Halftime Reload drop. Speaks only once: 'The gold always finds the bold.'

new_player_bonus.headline: Your First Game. Your First Win.
new_player_bonus.body: Lady E welcomes new players personally. Warm, inviting, gold-lit entrance scene.
new_player_bonus.cta: Join today — your bonus is already waiting.

daily_bonus_wheel.headline: Your Daily Spin Resets at Midnight.
daily_bonus_wheel.body: Quick urgent reminder during evening peak. Animated wheel or Lady E pointing urgently.
daily_bonus_wheel.cta: Claim it before the clock runs out.

referral_code.headline: Pass It Like a World Cup Assist
referral_code.body: Lucky Lou share scene. Referral code REF-MATCHDAY-847. Both win a Penalty Kick Free Spin.
referral_code.cta: Drop your code below — who are you bringing in today?

daily_bonus.headline: Daily Bonus Still Up for Grabs
daily_bonus.body: Final reminder before Golden Hour. Short punchy Lady E story frame.

todays_special_bonus.headline: Golden Boot Jackpot — All Day
todays_special_bonus.body: The player with the biggest recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus. The Golden Dealer reveals the prize. Dramatic, exclusive.
todays_special_bonus.cta: Be the top scorer. Claim the Golden Boot.

deals.name: Golden Boot Jackpot
deals.mechanic: Biggest single recharge of the day wins a multiplier bonus. Leaderboard announced at 10PM.
deals.tagline: Score the biggest. Win the boot.

deals.name: Hat Trick Bonus
deals.mechanic: Make 3 recharges during match window = stacked bonus on your account.

deals.name: Penalty Kick Free Spin
deals.mechanic: Share referral code REF-MATCHDAY-847. Friend joins = both receive a free spin bonus.
deals.tagline: Pass it. They score. You both win.

deals.name: Halftime Reload
deals.mechanic: Mystery bonus drop for players active in the Golden Hour window.

act_1.name: The Opening
act_1.energy: Match day has arrived. The whistle blows at Lady E Luck.

posts.title: Match Day Arrives
posts.description: Lady E (WC variant) blows gold whistle — coins explode outward into stadium floodlights. 'The world plays today. And so do we.' Reel opener.

posts.title: Match Day Monday Announcement
posts.description: Split scene: left side shows Lady E in referee dress on stadium field; right side shows spinning gold casino chips cascading like a goal-net. Text area intentionally blank — caption carries all messaging.

posts.title: Who's Your Team Today?
posts.description: Lucky Lou in soccer jersey giving a thumbs-up. Engagement story — prompt fans to pick Spain, Portugal, Belgium or USA. Fun, light, no commentary.

act_2.name: The Welcome
act_2.energy: New players arrive. Lady E opens the doors.

posts.title: New Player Bonus
posts.description: Lady E standing at a grand gold-lit doorway, arms open, warm smile. Casino interior glowing behind her. Welcoming, aspirational.

posts.title: New Player Bonus Story Frame
posts.description: Lady E close-up, gold earrings catching light, direct eye contact. 'First time here? Your bonus is waiting.' Short punchy story.

posts.title: Match Day Energy Check-In
posts.description: Lucky Lou cheering in soccer jersey, 4-leaf clover in hand. 'Match starts at 3PM. Are you ready?' Community vibe.

act_3.name: The Golden Rush
act_3.energy: Spain vs Portugal kicks off. Deal reveals. Referral push.

posts.title: Golden Boot Jackpot Reveal
posts.description: The Golden Dealer standing before a towering golden boot trophy made of stacked casino chips. Dramatic low lighting. Half-shadowed face. Cinematic.

posts.title: Golden Boot Story Reminder
posts.description: Same vibe — The Golden Dealer close-up. 'One player. One boot. All day.' Urgency.

posts.title: Referral — Pass Like a World Cup Assist
posts.description: Lucky Lou in jersey holding up a 4-leaf clover with code REF-MATCHDAY-847 visible in caption. Casual, friendly, community.

posts.title: Hat Trick Bonus Reveal Reel
posts.description: Lucky Lou making three dramatic 'goals' — each one a slot machine jackpot. Third one triggers a massive coin explosion. Fun, energetic, Dai Dai anthem energy.

act_4.name: Jackpot Parade
act_4.energy: Evening peak. Community wins. Daily bonus reminder. USMNT match at 8PM.

posts.title: Community Win Parade
posts.description: The Summer Crew — diverse group of 4-5 players in a stadium-like setting with gold confetti falling. Celebration energy. No individual focus — group win moment.

posts.title: Daily Bonus Wheel Reminder
posts.description: Lady E pointing urgently at a glowing countdown. 'Your daily spin resets at midnight. Don't sleep on it.'

posts.title: Daily Bonus Final Call
posts.description: Lady E close-up, one finger raised, gold watch visible. 'Still time. Claim your daily bonus.' Short and powerful.

act_5.name: Golden Hour
act_5.energy: Mystery drop. Lucky Lou's big win. Tomorrow tease.

posts.title: Halftime Reload Drop Announced
posts.description: The Golden Dealer in shadow, a single glowing chip spinning in his palm. 'The Halftime Reload is live. One hour only.'

posts.title: Lucky Lou's Big Win — Golden Hour
posts.description: Lucky Lou, jersey now with a championship scarf added, pulls the final slot — it hits jackpot. He jumps, does a soccer celebration knee-slide across a casino floor scattered with gold coins. Crowd erupts.

posts.title: Tomorrow's Tease
posts.description: Lady E from behind, looking out at a glowing casino floor. 'Tomorrow brings a new game. Be here.' Mysterious, aspirational.

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.instruments: Afrobeats percussion, trap hi-hats, bass synth, stadium crowd ambiance, gold shimmer synth lead, deep 808

lyrics.intro:
Ay... Lady E Luck on the field tonight
Golden boots and spinning chips, yeah we shining right
World Cup got the whole world on fire
Lady E Luck taking it higher, higher
lyrics.verse_1:
Monday morning, whistle blow, we step on the floor
Chips stacking like a hat trick, can't help but score
Lady E in the booth, gold crown on the throne
Every spin is a goal, every win is our own
Spain or Portugal, Belgium or the USA
Whoever you ride with, Lady E Luck gonna pay
The game don't stop when the final whistle blows
Golden Hour is coming and everybody knows
lyrics.pre_chorus:
You came to play, now play to win
Door's wide open, let the luck come in
Every match got a golden side
Lady E Luck, your winning guide
lyrics.chorus:
Golden kick, golden spin
Lady E Luck, let the magic begin
Golden kick, golden day
Match day at Lady E, we came to play
Golden kick, golden night
Stay in the game, keep the fire bright
Golden kick — oh oh oh
Lady E Luck, that's how we go
lyrics.verse_2:
Lucky Lou got his jersey on, clover in hand
Three recharges, hat trick done, part of the plan
Golden Dealer in the shadows, one chip in the light
'The gold always finds the bold' — truer words tonight
New player walking in, Lady E says welcome home
Your bonus is waiting, you never spin alone
Referral code spreading like an assist in the air
Penalty Kick Free Spin — because Lady E cares
lyrics.bridge:
This ain't just a game, this a celebration
Every win shared across the whole nation
Lady E Luck built for the community
Match day, bonus day, same opportunity
Dai Dai on the speakers, gold chips in the air
Halftime Reload coming — be there, be there
Golden Hour is the crown of the day
Lucky Lou always wins — that's the Lady E way
lyrics.final_chorus:
Golden kick, golden spin
Lady E Luck, let the magic begin
Golden kick, golden day
Match day at Lady E, we came to play
Golden kick, golden night
Stay in the game, keep the fire bright
Golden kick — oh oh oh
Lady E Luck, that's how we go
(That's how we go, that's how we go)
Lady E Luck, golden all the way
lyrics.outro:
The world plays tonight... Lady E Luck pays tonight
Match day madness... Golden Hour, all night
Spin it... claim it... Golden Boot, take flight
Lady E Luck... we shining, shining bright
